concerns.text: Task T006 (Create `data/raw/elemental_properties.csv`) is marked as incomplete ([ ]). Spec FR-003 and Constitution Principle VI require descriptors for ALL elements in the dataset. Without this file, T031 (Descriptor Calculator) cannot compute features for any alloy containing elements not hardcoded in the script, violating FR-003's requirement to compute 5 specific descriptors for all entries.

Task T028 (Generate `data/processed/completeness_report.json`) is marked as incomplete ([ ]). Spec SC-004 explicitly requires measuring 'Dataset completeness' by source. The absence of this task's output means SC-004 cannot be verified, leaving a mandatory success criterion unaddressed.

Task T028b (Scarcity Check & Warning Trigger) is marked as incomplete ([ ]). Spec FR-008 mandates a 'data scarcity warning' if N < 50. T028b is the trigger for T046 (Warning Report). Without T028b, the system cannot automatically detect the scarcity condition or generate the mandatory FR-008 report, violating the requirement.

Task T032 (Feature Engineering Pipeline) is marked as incomplete ([ ]). Spec FR-003 requires computing 5 descriptors for all entries. T032 is the orchestrator that applies T031 to the dataset. Without T032, the feature set `data/processed/alloys_features.csv` is never generated, blocking US2 (Model Training) and US3 (Validation) entirely.

Task T037 (Generate `data/processed/model_metrics.json`) is marked as incomplete ([ ]). Spec SC-001, SC-002, and SC-006 require reporting R², MAE, and p-values. T037 is the sole task responsible for aggregating these metrics. Its absence means no success criteria regarding model performance can be measured or reported.

Task T057 (NIST URL Resolution) is marked as [BLOCKED] and incomplete. Spec FR-001 requires data from 'at least 3 distinct sources' (NIST, Journal, Manual). T057 is the gate for the NIST source. If T057 remains unresolved, the pipeline falls back to Manual only (per T016 logic), failing the FR-001 requirement of 3 sources. The task list lacks a contingency or alternative path to satisfy FR-001 if external verification fails.

Task T058 (Journal DOI Resolution) is marked as [BLOCKED] and incomplete. Similar to T057, Spec FR-001 requires a 'published journal supplement'. T058 is the gate for this source. If unresolved, the pipeline falls back to Manual only, failing the FR-001 requirement of 3 distinct sources. No alternative task exists to satisfy this requirement if T058 fails.
